CustomField.description: When checked, disables the NPPatch Address object management features for Household Accounts. Address records will not be automatically created or synced when Contact or Account mailing addresses change. Disabled by default. Use this if you manage addresses through a different system or process.
CustomField.inlineHelpText: Disable automatic Address record management for Household Accounts. Address records won't be created or synced from Contact/Account address changes.
CustomField.label: Household Account Addresses Disabled
